refined_idea.qualified_problem: Inability to consistently provide 10-15 meals daily for tech workers due to lack of a platform to connect providers with demand
refined_idea.consequence: Tech workers face inconsistent meal availability, leading to lower satisfaction and potential health impacts
refined_idea.assumptions: Homemakers have the capacity and desire to cook 10-15 meals daily and the desire to monetize their kitchens to serve these tech workers. (approximate — to be refined)
refined_idea.proposed_solution: A hyper-local marketplace app. Customers subscribe to a weekly meal plan from a specific home chef in their 5km radius. We handle the payments and provide standardized eco-friendly packaging, while third-party logistics partners handle the daily lunch delivery at exactly 1 PM.

tips_validated_metrics.timely_factor: Timely: Yellow. The team identified a growing meal prep market but lacks direct evidence linking it to the specific challenge of homemakers providing consistent meals for tech workers.
tips_validated_metrics.profitability_pivot: Profitable: Yellow. The team has partial evidence of profitability through pilot data but lacks specific validation for market share feasibility and pricing models.
tips_validated_metrics.solvability_constraint: Solvable: Yellow. The team has a clear pricing model and pilot proof of concept but lacks specific evidence on the feasibility of their solution in the current market context.
tips_validated_metrics.contextual_note: Contextual: Yellow. The team has a plausible onboarding strategy but lacks evidence to confirm homemakers’ capacity and desire to participate in the model.
